arts.ttl: Preston's Osmajic handed eight-match ban and fine for Blackburn bite
arts.sum: Preston North End striker Mulatin Osmajic has been handed an eight-match ban and £15,000 fine for biting Blackburn defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic learns punishment for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck
arts.sum: The Football Association announces how many games Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic will miss for biting Blackburn Rovers defender Owen Beck.

arts.ttl: Preston star Milutin Osmajic handed EIGHT-match ban for biting Blackburn rival
arts.sum: Preston North End forward Milutin Osmajic has been suspended for eight matches after admitting to biting an opponent when the Championship side played Blackburn Rovers
